ratings.comment: He's a tough teacher, constaly giving me bad grades, made me cry ON THE FIRST DAY. But He's the most skibidi rizzler in Ohio he fanum taxed livvy dunn's gyatt with kai cenat coems style from the gyatt to the rizz to the sudz to the mew gyatt rizzler fr fr

Professor Bai's lecture slides were all posted online, but you did have to memorize them all if you wanted a decent chance at getting a good grade on the exams. The weekly homework was all math based and the exams were more conceptual. He asked random questions from lecture about percents, facts, etc. Overall good guy and class for quant B.
